cli.description: Use for pingo CLI wrapper (Node.js/TypeScript) - the process manager that wraps Claude Code in a PTY

desktop.description: Use for the Tauri desktop app (React/TypeScript + Rust) - companion GUI with event log, notifications, and sound alerts

build-cli.description: Build the pingo CLI TypeScript source

build-desktop.description: Build the Tauri desktop app frontend

dev-desktop.description: Start the desktop app in dev mode (Vite + Tauri)
dev-desktop.template: cd desktop && npm run tauri dev
